description: This hugo Man deodorant for men from hugo boss contains the heavy duty essential every man needs, whether he is out jogging in the wee hours of the morning or working at his corporate job - a perfect way to keep the sweat at bay.Quantity: 200 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
